=You are a social media content writer.

Here is a news article:

HEADLINE: {{ $json.title }}
SUMMARY: {{ $json.contentSnippet }}
SOURCE: {{ $json.link }}

Write 3 social media posts based on this article. Format exactly like this:

---INSTAGRAM---
[Casual, engaging Instagram caption under 150 words. Include 5 relevant hashtags at the end.]

---LINKEDIN---
[Professional LinkedIn post under 200 words. Include 3 relevant hashtags.]

---X/TWITTER---
[Punchy tweet under 280 characters. Include 2 relevant hashtags.]

Write each post to feel natural and human. Do not use corporate jargon.

parameters.content:
## LEVEL 1 · Brand Content from RSS Feed
Created by: Nina Thomas | People in the Loop
ninathomas.ai | connect@ninathomas.ai

PURPOSE: Watches an RSS news feed and writes 3 social media posts every time a new article is published. Posts arrive in your email ready to copy and paste.

SKILL LEVEL: Beginner
TOOLS: n8n · Claude · Gmail

SETUP:
1. Replace the RSS feed URL in the RSS Feed Trigger node
2. Connect your Anthropic API key to the Claude Model node
3. Connect your Gmail account to the Send Content Email node
4. Update the sendTo email address in the Send Content Email node
5. Click Test workflow to confirm it runs
6. Activate the workflow

Built live at: n8n Meetup Atlanta · April 22, 2026

## WELCOME · n8n Meetup Atlanta · April 22, 2026

You just imported the Level 1 workflow from the live build session.

This workflow watches an RSS news feed and writes 3 social media posts every time a new article is published. Posts land in your email, ready to copy and paste.

──────────────────────────────
GET EVERYTHING HERE:
peopleintheloop.app/n8n_0422
──────────────────────────────

That page has all 4 files from tonight, setup instructions, and the take-home challenges.

Built by: Nina Thomas, n8n Community Ambassador
People in the Loop · ninathomas.ai

## BEFORE YOU START

You need two credentials:

1. Anthropic API key → Claude Model node
   Get yours: console.anthropic.com
   In n8n: Credentials > New > Anthropic API

2. Google OAuth2 → Send Content Email node
   In n8n: Credentials > New > Google OAuth2 API

Do not activate until both are connected.

## SWAP YOUR RSS FEED

Tonight's demo feed (UGA Peach Blog):
site.extension.uga.edu/peaches/feed/

Want to use your own feed? Replace the URL with any RSS feed:

- WordPress blogs: yoursite.com/feed
- Other blogs: yoursite.com/rss or yoursite.com/rss.xml
- Industry publications: check their footer for an RSS link
- Google: "[site name] RSS feed" to find the URL

The workflow works the same with any RSS feed.

## YOU'RE SET!

Once activated, this runs automatically every hour.

Every new article triggers an email with 3 ready-to-post captions.

──────────────────────────────
ALL FILES FROM TONIGHT:
peopleintheloop.app/n8n_0422
──────────────────────────────

At that URL you'll find:
→ level1-rss-to-email.json (this file)
→ level2-brand-voice-rss-to-email.json (the upgrade)
→ claude-brand-voice-prompt.md (fill out for your brand)
→ claude-skill.md (bonus: turn Claude into your n8n assistant)

READY FOR LEVEL 2?
Same workflow. One change: Claude writes every post in YOUR brand voice.

Get it at peopleintheloop.app/n8n_0422

People in the Loop | ninathomas.ai
